name: Milk
description: Family has 3 school going children and 1 daughter still attending preschool. Mother is undergoing a divorce currently (with father not supporting financially and not residing together) and she recently lost her job due to her caregiving demands of her children. She has recently managed to find a job but requires some time to stabilise her finances. In the meantime, she would require help in milk as she tries to stabilise her finances. Thank you.

contact.org: Viriya Community Services - Whispering Hearts Family Service Centre

name: wheelchair
description:
Mr Kwek is a single elderly, aged 73 years old living in a 1 room rental flat. at home, he uses the rollator frame to ambulate. 

in the community for short distances, he has loaned a wheelchair from a nearby senior centre to travel about. While he has a PMD, the PMD's battery isnt reliable and mr kwek would prefer having a wheelchair to move about in his community.

Mr Kwek would benefit from having his own wheelchair.

passiton.name: Wheelchair
